/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot  -L/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr_x5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr_x5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr_x5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/x5/cross_compile/new/sysroot/usr_x5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc CMakeFiles/imu_reader_demo.dir/src/imu_reader_demo.cpp.o -o imu_reader_demo  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN:\$ORIGIN/lib" ../lib/libicm42688.so
